message:
feat: redesign OpenGraph social images with Frankenstein-themed branding

Overhaul the root OG image (app/opengraph-image.tsx) from a minimal
logo-and-text layout to a cinematic Frankenstein lab aesthetic:
- Deep background layer: subtle green grid overlay + faded screenshot
  (dashboard_fullscreen_overview.webp) for depth
- Global vignette with radial gradient and green glow accent
- Corner bolts rendered as small circles with X-cross detail
- Horizontal dashed stitches along top and bottom edges
- Logo section: franken-favicon.webp with glow halo and rounded border
- HUD accents: SYSTEM_ALIVE indicator, ORIGIN_PROTOCOL version tag,
  and FRANKENTUI.COM badge in the bottom-right
- Stats row: WORKSPACE (12 CRATES), THROUGHPUT (602K C/S),
  LOGIC (MATH-HEAVY) separated by a subtle border-top

Add per-page OG images for all 7 sub-routes, each with a unique page
title, contextual subtitle, and relevant background screenshot:
- /architecture  — "Inside the Machine" + code explorer bg
- /beads         — "Issue Tracker" + dashboard bg
- /getting-started — "Quick Start Guide" + dashboard bg
- /glossary      — "Terminal Lexicon" + dashboard bg
- /how-it-was-built — "The 5-Day Sprint" + dashboard bg
- /showcase      — "Terminal Vista" + dashboard bg
- /war-stories   — "Battle Reports" + dashboard bg

Add app/twitter-image.tsx as the Twitter-specific card image, sharing
the same Frankenstein visual language as the root OG image.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
